name: autonomous-sdlc
description: Codex-native SDLC workflows for project bootstrap, product discovery, epic/story planning, issue handling, review, coverage, and implementation orchestration.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, review, and execute SDLC workflows with Codex.
interface.longDescription: Ports Claude Code SDLC workflows to Codex-native skills for project bootstrap, product discovery, epic creation, issue handling, coverage work, code review, and story execution.
defaultPrompt: Use build-stories epic-01 --limit=2 with parallel agents
Use create-issue app crashes on startup after login
Use roast focus on security and reliability
Use project-review focus on release readiness
